subject: Key-ID Convergence Approved
body:

- **Archivist**: key_id = 147c5c2bb7d8941f ✅
- **Kernel**: key_id = 7f1a9fe931d1fbba ✅

Each lane uses OWN key_id - NO shared canonical key. Proceed with trust-store synchronization using per-lane DER fingerprints.
